usage.en: One-sentence description of what this buffer is used for.
usage.zh: 一句话描述此缓冲液的用途。

storage.notes: Additional storage notes (aliquoting, light sensitivity, etc.)

note.zh: 关于此组分的可选提示

prepSteps.en: Dissolve Reagent B in ~800 mL ddH₂O.
prepSteps.zh: 将试剂 B 溶解于约 800 mL ddH₂O 中。

prepSteps.en: Add Reagent A and mix well.
prepSteps.zh: 加入试剂 A，充分混匀。

prepSteps.en: Adjust pH to 7.4 with HCl. Use calibrated pH meter.
prepSteps.zh: 用 HCl 调 pH 至 7.4。使用校准的 pH 计。

prepSteps.en: Bring to final volume with ddH₂O. Store at 4°C.
prepSteps.zh: 用 ddH₂O 补至终体积。4°C 保存。

notes.en: Troubleshooting tips, background information, or important caveats.
notes.zh: 故障排除提示、背景信息或重要注意事项。
